AgentNode.description:
Executes a cognitive task using a CognitiveProfile configuration.

The 'profile' field is polymorphic:
- Pass a CognitiveProfile object for inline definition (Scripting mode).
- Pass a string ID to reference 'definitions.profiles' (Production mode).

operational_policy.description: Local operational limits. Overrides global Governance limits if set.

profile.title: Profile

EnsembleReasoning.description:
Multi-Model Consensus with Cascading Verification.
Executes parallel queries and uses a hybrid fast/slow path to verify agreement.
NOTE: disagreement_threshold < 0.6 is a strong signal of emergent instability.

fast_comparison_mode.title: Fast Comparison Mode

judge_model.title: Judge Model

ErrorHandler.description:
Maps specific failure types to a specific strategy.

Matching Logic:
1. Inter-field: AND. If 'match_domain' AND 'match_error_code' are set, BOTH must match.
2. Intra-field: OR. If 'match_domain' is ['LLM', 'SYSTEM'], the error can be EITHER.

match_domain.description: List of error domains to handle.
match_domain.title: Match Domain

match_error_code.description: List of specific error codes to match.
match_error_code.title: Match Error Code

match_pattern.description: Regex for fine-grained error message matching.
match_pattern.title: Match Pattern

ErrorHandler.title: ErrorHandler

SupervisionPolicy.description:
The container attached to every Node.

Note: Local supervision executes *before* global governance circuit breakers trip,
unless the error is a GovernanceViolation.

Evaluation Logic:
1. Iterate through 'handlers' list in order (Index 0 -> N).
2. First handler to match the error triggers its strategy.
3. If no handlers match:
   - If 'default_strategy' is set, execute it.
   - If 'default_strategy' is None, raise the original exception.

default_strategy.description: Catch-all strategy. If None, unhandled errors bubble up.
default_strategy.title: Default Strategy

handlers.description: An ordered list of specific rules.
handlers.title: Handlers

max_cumulative_actions.description: Total number of recovery actions (retries + reflexions + fallbacks) allowed.
max_cumulative_actions.title: Max Cumulative Actions

SupervisionPolicy.title: SupervisionPolicy

SwarmNode.description:
Dynamic Swarm Spawning (The "Hive").
Spins up N ephemeral worker agents to process a dataset/workload in parallel.

aggregator_model.description: If set, uses this model to summarize the worker outputs into a single string.
aggregator_model.title: Aggregator Model

distribution_strategy.description: Sharded=split data; Replicated=same data, many attempts.
distribution_strategy.title: Distribution Strategy

failure_tolerance_percent.description: 0.0 = All must succeed. 0.2 = Allow 20% failure. Executed AFTER the Node's 'resilience' strategy. E.g., if retries exhaust, this tolerance allows the Swarm to still succeed partially.
failure_tolerance_percent.title: Failure Tolerance Percent

max_concurrency.description: Limit parallel workers. Use 'infinite' for no limit.
max_concurrency.title: Max Concurrency

operational_policy.description: Local operational limits. Overrides global Governance limits if set.

output_variable.description: Variable to store the aggregated result.
output_variable.title: Output Variable

resilience.description: Error handling policy or reference ID.
resilience.title: Resilience
